textByHash.3935a8ec364c952c018d6348c0d165a50ba2c94a: A man fell off a wall? How tall is this wall?
textByHash.47daf9061082ec9763eab36f7387ca790bfdd29e: I see... Well, I can probably help once I can get out of here.
textByHash.192c7b7518d31a844d48667d8827d7f6b3eed431: As soon as I get my axe back. It's with the blacksmith, but he seems too busy to even talk to me. Think you can help get it back?
textByHash.3b11a7aac053a0355eebce0fea92102bfcb64de4: Perfect! You'll find him in the western part of town, not far from here.
textByHash.c70d347262b2037a25da3524f2f51f4de0cf87fd: Well, in that case, I think you'll need to help your egg without me.
textByHash.19667a4071719b5d841dd848d5e922979c94ff11: Oh, that's right. Well, if you can get me my axe back...
textByHash.f04a20edddb8a7ecf30569f64cb446c0cfe4dbc7: How are you getting on with my axe?
textByHash.a96de73438c2521a692753a2da1cc0ee02658e9f: Well, good luck getting a word in with that blacksmith!
textByHash.991d58e40ffbcf64ab3632a00348805be9530c28: Well, once it's finished, we can see about sorting out Wumty Scrumpty.
textByHash.704d502bbfe4b139f5f76f8f0c0c87778b18cdb6: Perfect! Hand it over, and then we'll see about Lumpty Mumpty.
textByHash.c49cfeb5ffe97577356d86f0af2197ce954a6661: The way I see it, we only have one option. We need to replace the egg.
textByHash.83199b61a3c6e0cbed2af224b5419c9b86ba61fb: We're going to need to obtain a chicken egg.
textByHash.c69c6c479d6c58f767169c936c9b23f92776f109: Not if it's from a rather large chicken.
textByHash.286dacf15c2981a257e2a1850eb65fa89c42740a: There's a chicken farm on the outskirts of Tal Teklan. I reckon you'll be able to find a large chicken egg there.
textByHash.59000739e81e20a12e3bd0a2131b9dc624ffb32e: There's a farm on the outskirts of Tal Teklan. I reckon you'll be able to find one there.
textByHash.c3ca3926e69063313e86d43823f703df17506597: Good work! I'll get it set up so its ready to be judged.
textByHash.e6a16207a011987013d4f164504bcc69ecfef6bf: The chicken egg is ready to be judged. You should get the other eggs gathered.
textByHash.28d3c844dd94900813b7eb8a3bfce9e02c5cdc50: There's only one thing for it. We're going to have to put Pumpty Lumpty back together again.
textByHash.c01df6c2e62647cb928b379473846beaee2cc102: Don't mention it. We're happy to have helped. Now, we should leave you to it.
textByHash.3248adba2b7f08d1afa4edebe05e0174a318c9ee: Sorry, but I'm busy right now.
